title: Dapetz® Mini Hand Drill Set with 20pcs HSS Twist Bits (0.3-1.6mm) - Archimedes Spiral Pin Vise, Manual Push Drill Chuck for Delicate Work, Model Making, and Drilling
features: Archimedes Drill Design: Features an Archimedes spiral pin vise with a brass finish, designed for precision and smooth operation. Equipped with a return spring for added convenience.
20 Sizes for Versatility: Includes 20 different sizes ranging from 0.3mm to 1.6mm, providing a wide variety of options to meet the needs of various delicate projects and drilling tasks.
Durable HSS Drill Bits: Made from high-speed steel (HSS), these mini twist drill bits are resistant to oxidation and corrosion, offering long-lasting durability and reliable performance.
Convenient Storage & Portability: The set comes with a compact storage box with separate grids, making it easy to store and organize your drill bits, ensuring portability and convenience on the go.
Ideal for Precision Drilling: The HSS micro drill bits are perfect for drilling into materials such as wood, resin, jewelry, PVC, acrylic, plastic, and more, ensuring clean and accurate holes.
description: Product Description ARCHIMEDES DRILL MATERIAL The Archimedes drill is ideal for precision drilling with Brass finish Fitted with a return spring. DRILL BIT MATERIAL The HSS micro drill bits is made up of high-speed steel, these mini twist bits are resistant to oxidation. With anti-corrosion, these HSS twist drill bits are durable and have a long service time. PORTABLE & CONVENIENT TO STORE These micro precision twist drill bits can be stored in one box, and there're several separate grids organizing different size bits. With this box, it's easy for you to carry these mini drill bits anywhere. Dapetz Archimedes Twist Drill 20Pc Micro Hss Bits Jewellery Watch Repair Model Craft The HSS micro drill bits is is ideal for wood, resin, jewelry, nuts, amber, beeswax, olives, pearls, PVC, acrylic and plastic, etc. SIZE This micro drill bit set has 20 pieces of drill bits with 20 different sizes, including (0.3, 0.35, 0.4, 0.45, 0.5, 0.55, 0.6, 0.65, 0.7, 0.75, 0.8, 0.85, 0.9, 0.95, 1.0, 1.2, 1.3, 1.4, 1.5, 1.6) mm FEATURES ARCHIMEDES DRILL MATERIAL DRILL BIT MATERIAL PORTABLE & CONVENIENT TO STORE
